text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. In the first scene, surrounded by people in what seems to be a modern entryway, I am both an observer and a participant stepping into a collective experience. There is a blend of social energy and slight nervousness—a threshold crossing. Entering the vibrant R+D display in the second scene, colors and words envelop me, prompting intellectual engagement. I feel ignited by possibilities, inspired by the confluence of human research and imaginative expression. The space seems to invite questions more than answers, and that excites me as a philosopher.
